name: Baked Stuffed Eggs
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 ounces condensed cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice eggs in half lengthwise; remove yolks and set whites aside.
2. In a bowl, mash the yolks with a fork.
3. Add sour cream, mustard, and salt to the mashed yolks; mix well.
4. Fill the egg whites with the yolk mixture.
5. In a saucepan, sauté onion in butter until tender.
6. Add soup and sour cream to the onions; mix well.
7. Pour half of the sauce into an ungreased 11x7x2-inch baking pan.
8. Arrange the stuffed eggs on top of the sauce in the pan.
9. Spoon remaining sauce over the eggs.
10. Sprinkle with cheese and paprika.
11. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
12. Remove from the refrigerator 30 minutes before baking.
13. Bake, uncovered at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until heated through.
14. Serve immediately.
